user_query:
I’m a historian coordinating a one-hour translation meeting, and I need an agenda and action items generated from the materials in this workspace. Please use the document register at input/docs/register.csv, the draft translations present under input/drafts/, and the collaborators list at input/collaborators.csv.

Requirements:
- Meeting window: 2026-04-20, 14:00–15:00 UTC (60 minutes total), starting exactly at 14:00 UTC.
- Focus only on documents whose language is exactly "Old French" or "Latin".
- Determine whether each document has a draft by inspecting the input/drafts directory for a file named <doc_id>.txt (do not trust the "status" field in the register without verifying by file presence). Use this to derive the purpose:
  - has_draft = true -> purpose = "Review"
  - has_draft = false -> purpose = "Assign"
- Ranking for selection (deterministic):
  - First schedule all Review items (has_draft = true), ranked by rarity_score (descending), then due_date (ascending), then doc_id (ascending).
  - Next, fill any remaining time with Assign items (has_draft = false) using the same ranking criteria.
  - Use estimated_minutes from the register as the meeting discussion duration per item. Do not exceed 60 total minutes.
- Assignment of each agenda item to a collaborator: choose any collaborator whose languages list (semicolon-separated) contains the document’s language string exactly. If multiple are eligible, pick the collaborator with fewer items already assigned in this agenda; if still tied, choose the one whose name is alphabetically first.
- Schedule items sequentially from 14:00 UTC based on their durations (no overlaps). Compute start_time_utc and end_time_utc for each item.
- Ignore documents in other languages for this meeting.

Deliverables (create the outputs directory if missing):
1) outputs/agenda_items.csv with header: order,start_time_utc,end_time_utc,doc_id,title,language,purpose,assignee
2) outputs/action_items.csv with header: doc_id,action,assignee,language,due_date,meeting_date
   - For Review items, action = "Review draft and finalize comments".
   - For Assign items, action = "Start translation draft".
   - meeting_date = 2026-04-20.
3) outputs/meeting_agenda_2026-04-20.md containing:
   - A brief header with the meeting date/time and a one-line purpose.
   - An Attendees section listing all collaborators from input/collaborators.csv (names only).
   - An Agenda section enumerating the scheduled items, including for each: start_time_utc–end_time_utc, doc_id, title, language, purpose (Review or Assign), and assignee.
4) outputs/selection.csv with header: doc_id,title,language,rarity_score,due_date,estimated_minutes,status_from_register,has_draft,derived_purpose,eligible_for_meeting,selected_order (empty if not selected)
   - eligible_for_meeting = true only when language is Old French or Latin.
   - has_draft must be computed by inspecting input/drafts/ for <doc_id>.txt.

Notes:
- The selection and ordering must be reproducible from the inputs and rules above.
- Keep the total scheduled minutes <= 60.
- Treat status_from_register as informational only; derived_purpose must come from actual draft file presence.

Inputs are provided below; please read the CSVs and inspect the input/drafts directory to decide which documents are ready for Review vs need Assign. Produce all four outputs under outputs/ and ensure they are internally consistent. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
